extraction.one_line_summary: MERLIER Tim won from chaos after Alpecin-Fenix stayed anonymous until leadout teams (Lotto-Soudal, Groupama-FDJ) collapsed in final 500m
tactical_patterns: Alpecin-Fenix concealed Merlier completely while Lotto/Groupama exhausted themselves, striking only when leadouts fractured after 3.2km corner
POGACAR Tadej attacked intermediate sprint atop citadel climb despite race lead, signaling every bonus second matters for stage race
KOOIJ Olav recovered from 15th position at 200m to go for second, indicating superior speed squandered by positioning

rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: positive: Won after being sheltered all day while rivals' teams worked, showing peak form and tactical discipline
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: Hunted bonus seconds at intermediate sprint on uphill finish despite GC lead, reveals obsessive margin-building instinct
rider_signals.KOOIJ Olav: neutral: Fastest raw speed (15th to 2nd in 200m) but positioning failures mask finishing power
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: Described as having 'off day' alongside Kristoff/Viviani/Ewan, suggesting form not yet sharp
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: Total Energies worked hard for positioning but Sagan's jump triggered sprint too early, gifting Merlier draft
